test.note: Unit tests passed (312 tests). Typecheck and lint also passed.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Home page 'load time' measurement includes registration time rather than pure page load. Console error filter masks 401/400 HTTP errors which could indicate real bugs. Session start timing includes UI wait time rather than click-to-response delta.
hasVisibleFocusIndicator background-color check could flag non-focus-related background colors. Navigation links contrast test only verifies lowestRatio is finite rather than passing WCAG AA.
borderColor check may miss some edge cases. Semi-transparent backgrounds like rgba(255,255,255,0.5) treated as opaque. Navigation links contrast test has weak assertion.

STREAM_TIMEOUT_MS fallback in chat.ts is unreachable dead code (streamFinished is always true after for-await loop completes). Worker also refactored buildChatMessages to buildTokenLimitedContext beyond scope of core fix.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce TDD requirement: 'Write failing unit tests for the service/route before implementation'. The fix-ollama-streaming-completion worker did not add new unit tests for the streaming completion fix despite skill requiring TDD. Existing tests only verify it's an async generator and rejects when offline - they don't test the completion scenario with done:true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: backend/services/ollama.test.ts:118-127 only tests basic behavior, not streaming completion. The handoff shows 312 tests pass but no new tests were added specifically for this fix.

previousRound.note: Round 2 failed due to infrastructure (services not running for e2e tests). The blocking issue was environment-related, not code issues. All validators pass in round 3.
